generated_oml:
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "geometric BIM representations enriched with semantic device metadata (sensors, actuators, controllers) defined within the BIM environment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) principles transform enriched models into structured DT artifacts"
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto middleware managing bidirectional data exchange"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, BuildingControlEngineerService
]

instance Hono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Hono middleware managing bidirectional data exchange"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, BuildingControlEngineerService
]

instance TwinComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TwinComponent extension point enabling custom behaviors (e.g., LightTwinComponent processes Revit photometric values for lighting control in UE5)"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, BuildingControlEngineerService
]

instance FeatureParser : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "FeatureParser extension point for custom behaviors"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, BuildingControlEngineerService
]

instance TwinLight : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Development environment supported by TwinLight (Grant 898708)"
]

instance BOREALIS : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Development environment supported by BOREALIS (Grant 910225)"
]

instance UnrealTwinController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "UnrealTwinController using UE5 Delegates and the Observable pattern for brokering control commands"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance LightingSystemActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting system with photometric parameters (brightness, color temperature in Kelvin) derived from BIM metadata"
]

instance DittoDevice : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Handles device addressing and connection management for Eclipse Ditto"
]

instance DittoConnection : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Handles connection management for Eclipse Ditto"
]

instance AECOBuildingInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure in the AECO domain comprising BCS components and BIM data"
    base:contains LightingSystemActuator, DittoDevice, DittoConnection
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization for immersive system oversight"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight, BuildingControlAction
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics and optimization services for decision-making"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalDecisionInsight
]

instance BuildingControlEngineerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Device modeling and control logic configuration for Building Control Engineers"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceModelingInsight, ControlLogicConfigurationAction
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations for Facility Managers"
]

instance OperationalDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational decision-making insight from analytics"
]

instance DeviceModelingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for device modeling"
]

instance BuildingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control action for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlLogicConfigurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action for configuring control logic"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT Framework acts as a central hub facilitating bidirectional data exchange between roles such as Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers, utilizing a modular architecture with standardized extension points for service integration to enable holistic building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling and control logic configuration by Building Control Engineers using BIM, followed by Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to generate structured representations and deployable artifacts. Runtime operations include real-time data synchronization and interactive visualization for Facility Managers, while DT Engineers extend functionality through custom services via standardized extension points."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity and data integrity are maintained through Eclipse Ditto's policy-based validation of sensor data ranges and units, alongside pre-execution checks for actuator commands. Fault tolerance is ensured by Eclipse Hono's at-least-once message delivery and Ditto's persistent event storage, mitigating data loss during network disruptions. These mechanisms collectively ensure synchronization and operational safety between physical assets and their digital twins."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperability across heterogeneous systems through standardized extension points for service integration, scalability from individual components to entire infrastructure systems, and maintainability via low-overhead updates."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework leverages Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards for device modeling and semantic foundation creation, addressing BIM's static representation limitations for dynamic DTs. Specific compliance with additional standards or interoperability protocols is not elaborated in the documents."
]
